title: Raban
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Raban |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species= |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]]{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)}} |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=[[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Chief? Sorry to interrupt, Lieutenant.''"
"''What is it, Raban?''"
"''We've got a report of a fight between two passengers at the Galleria Shop.|Raban reports to Detien Kaileel|}} '''Raban''' was a [[Security officer/Legends|security officer]] onboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']] under [[Chief of Security/Legends|Security Chief]] [[Detien Kaileel]]. He reported an incident to Kaileel regarding a fight between two passengers occurring in the [[Galleria Shop]]. ==Appearances== *{{JournalCite|8|A Certain Point of View (short story)|reprint=1}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Raban }} [[Category:Guards]] [[Category:Individuals of unspecified species]] [[Category:Kuari Princess crewmembers]] [[Category:Males]]
